# CryptoTools

> Non-standard AI discovery hint file. Not an official web standard.

## Site
- Canonical: https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/
- Purpose: Browser-based encryption/decryption utilities.
- Language: en

## Main Routes
- https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/aes-encrypt
- https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/aes-decrypt
- https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/des-encrypt
- https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/des-decrypt
- https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/tripledes-encrypt
- https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/tripledes-decrypt
- https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/rc4-encrypt
- https://encrypt-tools.thanhlv.com/rc4-decrypt

## Data Handling
- Processing: Client-side in browser.
- Network dependency: Not required for core crypto operations.
- Inputs: Plaintext/ciphertext and secret key entered by user.
- Warning: DES and RC4 are legacy algorithms; use with caution.

## Content Policy Signals
- Search indexing preference is controlled via robots.txt and meta directives.
- Snippet behavior can be controlled with robots meta and data-nosnippet patterns if added later.
